executives.name: Charles Holliday, Jr.
executives.background: Former Chairman of Royal Dutch Shell plc and former Chairman and CEO of DuPont.

executives.name: Kristina Johnson
executives.background: Former President of The Ohio State University. Former Chancellor of the State University of New York.

executives.name: Marillyn Hewson
executives.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of Lockheed Martin Corporation. Director since 2021.

executives.name: Ruby Chandy
executives.background: Ms. Chandy was the President of the Industrial Division of Pall Corporation from 2012 to 2015. She previously served as Chief Marketing Officer of Rohm and Haas Company.
